title: Add shell validation CI workflow
description: Implement the sixth task from docs/plans/2026-06-01-first-improvement-series.md: add GitHub Actions validation for bash -n, ShellCheck, and read-only CLI smoke tests.

title: Document explicit macOS setup workflow
description: Implement the seventh task from docs/plans/2026-06-01-first-improvement-series.md: update README with safety model, usage modes, sections, validation, and development workflow.

title: Add read-only defaults drift detection
description: Implement the fourth task from docs/plans/2026-06-01-first-improvement-series.md: add --check mode that reads current defaults values and reports PASS, FAIL, or MISSING without writing preferences.

title: Move preference writes behind explicit apply mode
description: Implement the fifth task from docs/plans/2026-06-01-first-improvement-series.md: make --apply the only path that writes defaults and move System Settings quit behavior into apply-only flow.

title: Add dry-run mode for declared settings
description: Implement the third task from docs/plans/2026-06-01-first-improvement-series.md: render the defaults write commands that --apply would run without mutating macOS preferences.

title: Add setting registry and list mode
description: Implement the second task from docs/plans/2026-06-01-first-improvement-series.md: represent current active defaults writes as declared settings and make --list print the registry with section filtering.

title: Add explicit CLI modes and parser
description: Implement the first task from docs/plans/2026-06-01-first-improvement-series.md: add --help, --list, --dry-run, --check, --apply, --section parsing, and make mode selection explicit before any side effects.

title: Repair Beads Dolt sync and macOS pre-push timeout behavior
description: bd dolt push hangs at 'Pushing to Dolt remote...' even though normal HTTPS git auth to https://github.com/pjbeyer/macOS-setup.git succeeds via osxkeychain. The generated Beads pre-push hook also does not bound execution on macOS because GNU timeout is unavailable, so git push can hang unless --no-verify is used. Investigate credential propagation for Dolt git+https remotes and add/patch a macOS-safe timeout strategy or documented workaround.

title: Design first macOS setup improvement series
description: Design the first cohesive series of improvements for the macOS setup utility starting from main. Initial themes to evaluate: safe CLI modes, dry-run/check/apply behavior, structured setting metadata, drift detection, macOS version guards, and CI/lint gates.
close_reason: Implementation plan written and follow-up Beads issues created

comments.author: Phil Beyer
comments.text: Design completed in docs/plans/2026-06-01-first-improvement-series.md. Follow-up implementation issues created and dependency-linked: macos-5ge -> macos-t69 -> macos-d67 -> macos-151 -> macos-bpu -> macos-3un -> macos-e9z.
